content.content:
# Lac d'Annecy Beaches

## Listed Beaches

**1. Plage de Saint-Jorioz**
- Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz
- Price: Free (Gratuit)
- Supervision: Not specified
- Description: "The only large natural sand beach on Lake Annecy, equipped with shaded lawns, diving board and accessible facilities"

**2. Plage d'Albigny**
- Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-albigny
- Price: Free (Gratuit)
- Supervision: Not specified
- Description: "The largest public beach on Lake Annecy, with 400 meters of grassy shoreline facing the mountains"

**3. Plage des Marquisats**
- Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-des-marquisats
- Price: Free (Gratuit)
- Supervision: Monitored in summer ("surveillée en été")
- Description: "Grass beach 200 meters long on the western shore, with accessibility features and 10 minutes' walk from the old town"

content.text: Let me read the individual beach pages to get detailed price and supervision info.

input.prompt: What is the entry price (tarif/prix d'entrée) and lifeguard supervision (surveillance/baignade surveillée, dates and hours)? Also note facilities relevant to families with small children.

What is the entry price (tarif/prix d'entrée) and lifeguard supervision (surveillance/baignade surveillée, dates and hours)? Also note facilities relevant to families with small children.

content.content:
# Plage de Saint-Jorioz: Entry Prices & Supervision

## Entry Prices
- **Adults (18+):** €2.60
- **Children (10-17 years):** €1.00
- **Children under 10:** Free
- **After 4:30 PM:** €1.00 (all ages)
- **Season pass (unlimited July-Aug):** €22.00
- **September-June:** Free access

## Lifeguard Supervision
"Accès payant et surveillance MNS du 1er juillet au 31 août de 9h30 à 17h30" (Paid access with lifeguard supervision July 1-August 31, 9:30 AM-5:30 PM). The beach closes 7 AM-9:30 AM for cleaning during this period.

## Family-Friendly Facilities
- Shallow sandy beach with gentle slope
- Paddling pool (*pataugeoire*)
- Children's play area
- Three-level diving platform (5 meters)
- Shaded grassy areas for picnicking
- Beach volleyball and pétanque courts
- On-site restaurant and snack bar
- Free parking (large shaded lot)
- Wheelchair accessible with free amphibious chairs (July-August)

content.content:
# Plage des Marquisats: Entry Price, Lifeguard Supervision & Family Facilities

**Entry Price:**
"Gratuit" (Free) — The beach is entirely free year-round, with no admission charge.

**Lifeguard Supervision:**
Monitored from the start of summer school holidays through August 31, operating daily from 11 AM to 7 PM. However, supervision is specifically limited to "juillet-août" (July-August).

**Family-Friendly Features:**
The beach offers several amenities ideal for families with young children:
- A grassy area approximately 200 meters long with "nombreux coins d'ombre sous les arbres" (numerous shaded spots under trees)
- Shallow water entry through a sand bank, then gradually deepening rocky bottom
- "Douches, toilettes gratuites" (free showers and restrooms)
- A summer snack bar for refreshments
- Accessible facilities including amphibious wheelchairs and secure pathways
- Adjacent clubs offering water activities for observation or participation

- Adjacent clubs offering water activities for observation or participation

content.content:
# Plage d'Albigny: Entry Price, Lifeguard Supervision & Family Facilities

**Entry Price:**
"Gratuit" (free access). The beach is one of only two free public beaches in Annecy.

**Lifeguard Supervision:**
Lifeguards are present "en juillet-août de 11h à 19h" (July-August from 11am to 7pm daily). Outside this period, swimming is unsupervised.

**Family-Friendly Facilities:**
- Gentle sandy bottom with gradual slope ideal for young children
- Three free sanitary blocks and outdoor showers
- Children's play areas on-site
- Ping-pong tables and petanque court
- Large grassy lawn suitable for picnicking and sunbathing
- Wheelchair-accessible water entry with free floating chairs (July-August)
- Stroller-friendly terrain with flat, grassy areas

**Practical Tip for Families:**
Arrive before 11am during July-August to secure space on the lawn.

content.text:
I compared two beaches on Lac d'Annecy using the pages on loisirs74.fr. I chose **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** and **Plage d'Albigny**, since both have gentle sandy entries that matter most for small children.

## Comparison

| | **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** | **Plage d'Albigny (Annecy)** |
|---|---|---|
| **Entry price** | Paid in Jul–Aug: adults €2.60, ages 10–17 €1.00, **under-10s free**, €1.00 for everyone after 4:30 PM, season pass €22. Free Sept–June. | **Free** year-round. |
| **Lifeguard supervision** | MNS lifeguards **1 July – 31 Aug, 9:30 AM–5:30 PM** (closed 7:00–9:30 AM for cleaning). | Lifeguards **July–Aug, 11 AM–7 PM**; unsupervised outside that. |
| **Water for small kids** | Shallow sandy beach, gentle slope, plus a dedicated **paddling pool (pataugeoire)** and children's play area. | Gentle sandy bottom with gradual slope; children's play areas on-site. |
| **Family extras** | Shaded lawns, restaurant/snack bar, free shaded parking, free amphibious chairs. | Free toilets/showers, large lawn, snack bar, stroller-friendly, free floating chairs. |

## Recommendation: **Plage de Saint-Jorioz**

For a family with small children, I'd recommend **Saint-Jorioz**, for three reasons:

1. **Best supervision window.** Its lifeguards start at **9:30 AM** — two hours earlier than Albigny's 11 AM. Young children are usually at their best in the morning, so you get supervised swimming during the calmest, coolest part of the day.
2. **Purpose-built for little ones.** It has a **pataugeoire (paddling pool)** in addition to the shallow, gentle-slope sandy beach — a safer, contained option for toddlers that Albigny doesn't offer.
3. **Cost is negligible for your case.** The paid entry is the main drawback versus free Albigny, but **children under 10 are free**, so a family with small kids pays only €2.60 per adult (and just €1.00 after 4:30 PM). The controlled, paying entry also tends to mean a less crowded, better-maintained beach.

If keeping it entirely free is the priority, **Albigny** is the strong runner-up — also sandy with a gentle slope and free facilities — but its supervision only runs 11 AM–7 PM.

*Note: prices, dates, and hours are as listed on loisirs74.fr; it's worth confirming the current-season details before you go, as these can change year to year. Per your instructions, I only browsed and read pages — no forms or bookings.*
